name: Refried Bean Burgers
recipeIngredient: Refried Beans, prepared according to package
recipeInstructions:
1/2 cup Stock or water, if needed
1 cup Cooked rice
1 cup Toasted sesame seeds
2 tbsp Nutritional yeast
1/4 cup Tamari
1/4 tsp Oregano
1/4 tsp Thyme
1/2 cup Raw grated carrots
2 cups Rolled oats or bread crumbs
1. Mix all ingredients together and form into patties.
2. Freeze the patties for 30 minutes to an hour.
3. Remove the patties from the freezer and fry or bake them until cooked through.
4. Add mustard if desired for a different taste.
5. Makes approximately 10-12 burgers.
